# error-handling-auditor

| | |
|---|---|
| Category | `reviewers` |
| Type | gate |
| Model | `sonnet` |
| Tools | `Read, Grep, Glob, Bash` |

**Fires when:** swallowed/mishandled-error review of failure paths (config-enabled or tagged error-handling)

Source of truth: [`.claude/agents/reviewers/error-handling-auditor.md`](../../.claude/agents/reviewers/error-handling-auditor.md) · catalog row in [`catalog/agents.tsv`](../../catalog/agents.tsv).
